news.headline: Hungary’s Orban won’t take up parliament seat after landslide loss, wants to lead renewal
news.summary:
Hungary’s outgoing Prime Minister Viktor Orban said he would not take up his seat in parliament following his party’s landslide defeat in this month’s election but wants to stay on as Fidesz’s leader to lead a process of “renewal”.

news.headline: Trump calls off Witkoff, Kushner trip to Pakistan for Iran peace talks
news.summary: The president’s announcement came after Iranian officials left Pakistan on Saturday after downplaying the prospect of direct talks with U.S. officials on a deal.

news.headline: Police arrest demonstrators at pro-Palestine rally in Berlin
news.summary: Video footage shared on social media shows two women being arrested at a pro-Palestine demonstration in Berlin.

news.headline: Protestor depicts Israeli minister Ben Gvir covered in blood in Stockholm
news.summary: Activists organised a protest in solidarity with Palestine on Saturday in Stockholm, Sweden.

news.headline: Orbán steps down from Hungarian parliament after landslide defeat
news.summary: The outgoing prime minister will not take up his seat after leading his party back into opposition.

news.headline: Japan’s New Care Workers: Bodybuilders, Wrestlers and M.M.A. Fighters
news.summary: Young athletes are being recruited to plug a staff shortage in Japan’s nursing homes. The results are reshaping elder care.

news.headline: Barcelona on the brink of defending La Liga title after beating Getafe
news.summary: Barcelona move 11 points clear of Real Madrid in the La Liga title race with five games to play.
